name: fides-wallet-catalog
description: FIDES Community Wallet Catalog - Decentralized wallet registration and display

scripts.crawl:sync: npm run crawl:local-community && npm run sync-local
scripts.validate:v2: ajv validate --spec=draft2020 -c ajv-formats -s schemas/wallet-catalog.schema.json -d 'community-catalogs/**/wallet-catalog.json' --strict=false && ajv validate --spec=draft2020 -c ajv-formats -s schemas/wallet-catalog.schema.json -d 'schemas/fixtures/*.json' --strict=false
scripts.wp-sync:local: FIDES_CATALOG_SECRET=$(php scripts/read-wp-catalog-secret.php 2>/dev/null) tsx scripts/import-wp-submissions.ts --apply --wp-url http://utrecht-demo.local/wp-json/fides-catalog/v1/export/wallet && npm run validate && npm run crawl && npm run sync-local
scripts.test: npm run test:import && npm run test:schema && npm run test:migrate
